  • Uses of ApplicationRestriction in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder

    Fields in de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder declared as ApplicationRestriction
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected ApplicationRestriction
    FindTacletBuilder.applicationRestriction
    encodes restrictions on the state where a rewrite taclet is applicable If the value is equal to NONE no state restrictions are posed SAME_UPDATE_LEVEL then \assumes must match on a formula within the same state as \find rsp.
